overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through rural countryside. The character travels from a forested area through open meadows with wooden fences, passing villagers, and approaching a distant village settlement under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge transitioning to open meadow

events.description: exits dense pine forest into open grassy meadow with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path from forested area into open meadow

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming dense forest edge with dark green foliage
rustic wooden fence made of rough-hewn logs lining the path
winding dirt trail with patches of grass growing through
tall green grass and wildflowers covering the open field

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dense pine forest with tall trees surrounding the path. As the character walks forward, the scene transitions to an open meadow with tall grass and a wooden fence running alongside the dirt path. The sky is partly cloudy with bright natural sunlight casting shadows across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural countryside path with wooden fencing

events.description: character passes a woman in a green dress walking in the opposite direction
character passes another villager in a red skirt near the fence

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path passing villagers and continuing toward the distant settlement

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking along the path toward the camera
villager in red skirt standing near the wooden fence

entered.detail: hazy blue mountains visible on the horizon beneath the clouds
tall pointed spire of a village church visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open meadows along a dirt path lined with wooden fences. The landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains and a village church spire on the horizon. The character passes villagers walking along the path, including a woman in a green dress walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: large rock outcrop comes into view on the right side of the path
village buildings become more distinct and visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through open grasslands with the destination village becoming visible ahead

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder formation beside the path
cluster of wooden village buildings with red roofs and timber framing

segments.scene_description: The path continues through expansive grasslands with scattered trees. A large rock outcrop appears on the right side of the path. In the distance, the village buildings with red roofs become more prominent against the backdrop of mountains. The wooden fences give way to open meadows as the settlement approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding countryside path with distant village

events.description: path curves gently to the left as the character continues toward the village

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path with the village settlement visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: small clusters of pine trees dotting the meadow landscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a winding dirt path through open grasslands. The path curves gently to the left as it approaches the distant village. Scattered trees dot the landscape, and the village buildings shift to the left side of the frame as the journey continues toward the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosure of a dense pine forest into the expansive openness of a rural village landscape. It begins beneath tall trees surrounding a dirt path, which gradually opens into a sunlit meadow characterized by tall grass and guiding wooden fences under a partly cloudy sky. As the character progresses, the horizon expands to reveal distant mountains and a church spire, while the camera passes villagers, including a woman in a green dress, walking along the way. The scene then shifts toward expansive grasslands and a large rock outcrop, where the wooden fences disappear and red-roofed village buildings become more prominent. Finally, the path curves gently to the left through scattered trees, bringing the settlement into closer view as the buildings shift across the frame.
